title: The Signal And The Noise
summary:
Main
The three things investors should know this week - and which risk markets seem to ignore, for now:
Europe has a big decision to make in the next few months: will it pull together, address its inefficiencies and make a productivity push, or will it become less relevant in a very quickly changing world? American inflation is pulling up, even before any trade disruptions begin to be counted in the data. The US has taken another step towards imposing global tariffs.
